heading: Sources of funds
label: 1076 Sources of funds
text: Loans made by eligible lenders in accordance with this part shall be insurable by the Secretary whether made from funds fully owned by the lender or from funds held by the lender in a trust or similar capacity and available for such loans.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1076, , , ; , , ; , , , related to insurability of loans made from funds owned by lender or held by lender in trust, prior to the general revision of this part by .Pub.
